user.title: Connect to Suno
user.description: Paste the `__client` cookie from [{suno_url}]({suno_url}). Open DevTools → Application → Cookies → copy the `__client` value.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Suno
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Paste a fresh `__client` cookie from [{suno_url}]({suno_url}).

reconfigure.title: Library
reconfigure.description: Choose which parts of your Suno library to include.

data_description.download_path: Local folder for saving songs. Leave empty for streaming only.
data_description.create_playlists: Save playlist files alongside your music for other apps.
data_description.cache_max_size_mb: Maximum disk space for cached audio (MB).

error.invalid_cookie: Could not authenticate.  Check your cookie is correct and not expired.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Suno.  Check your network connection.

abort.already_configured: This Suno account is already configured.

init.title: Library
init.description: Choose which parts of your Suno library to include.

data_description.download_path: Local folder for saving songs. Leave empty for streaming only.
data_description.create_playlists: Save playlist files alongside your music for other apps.
data_description.cache_max_size_mb: Maximum disk space for cached audio (MB).

data_description.download_mode_playlists: Mirror removes local files when songs are removed from a playlist. Collect keeps all downloads permanently.
data_description.all_playlists: Download all your playlists. Turn off to choose specific playlists.

liked.title: Liked Songs
liked.description: Download settings for your liked songs.

data_description.download_mode_liked: Mirror removes local files when you unlike a song. Collect keeps all downloads permanently.

latest.title: Your Latest
latest.description: How many of your latest songs to include and at what quality.

data_description.download_mode_latest: Mirror removes songs that no longer match the limits below. Collect keeps all downloads permanently.
data_description.latest_count: Include up to this many of your latest songs. Set to 0 for no limit.
data_description.latest_days: Only include songs created within this many days. Set to 0 for no limit.

error.invalid_download_path: Path is not writable.  Check the directory exists and Home Assistant has write permission.
error.download_path_conflict: This download directory is already in use by another Suno account.

auth_failed.message: Authentication failed.  Check your Suno cookie is valid and not expired.
